zh.Of, Kildale, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾吉爾達爾
zh.Kildale, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾吉爾達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Percy於1215年出生在英國越可爾吉爾達爾時，他的父親Walter de Percy30歲，母親Joan38歲。他於1237年之前與Nichola de Stuteville在英國越可爾吉爾達爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年4月22日享年80歲。

zh-hans.Of, Kildale, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾吉爾達爾
zh-hans.Kildale, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾吉爾達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Percy于1215年出生在英国越可爾吉爾達爾时，他的父亲Walter de Percy30岁，母亲Joan38岁。他于1237年之前与Nichola de Stuteville在英国越可爾吉爾達爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年4月22日享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Percy was born in 1215, in Kildale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Walter de Percy, was 30 and his mother, Joan, was 38. He married Nichola de Stuteville before 1237, in Kildale, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 April 1295, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Percy est né en 1215, à Kildale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Percy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Nichola de Stuteville avant 1237, à Kildale, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1295, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Percy 1215 in Kildale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Percy 30 und seine Mutter Joan 38. Er hat vor 1237 in Kildale, Yorkshire, England Nichola de Stuteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. April 1295 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Percy è nato il nel 1215 nel Kildale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Percy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Nichola de Stuteville prima del 1237, nel Kildale, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 aprile 1295, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percyが1215年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルダルで生まれた時，父Walter de Percyは30歳，母Joanは38歳であった。1237年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルダルでNichola de Stutevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年4月22日に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy(이)가 1215년 영국 요르크실르 킬데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Percy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1237년 이전 영국 요르크실르 킬데일에서 Nichola de Stuteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 4월 22일 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Percy nasceu em 1215, em Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Percy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola de Stuteville antes 1237, em Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1295, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Percy родился в 1215 г. в местности каилдеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Percy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola de Stuteville перед 1237 г. в местности каилдеил, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 апреля 1295 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Percy nació en 1215, en Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Percy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Nichola de Stuteville antes de 1237, en Kildale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de abril de 1295, a la edad de 80 años.
